question: List the names of ipilimumab trials for melanoma where the overall follow-up duration was greater than 21 months?
final_sql: SELECT "Trial name" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Name of ICI" = 'Ipilimumab' AND "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21
decomposed_queries: Which trials have Name of ICI = 'Ipilimumab'?
Which trials have Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall > 21?

retrieval_top.candidate_question: What trials have Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall > 21?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

retrieval_top.candidate_question: What trials have Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall greater than 21?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Follow-up duration for primary endpoint(s) in months | Overall" > 21;

retrieval_top.candidate_question: What trials have Cancer type equal to 'Melanoma'?
retrieval_top.candidate_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma';
